title: Storify - Story Mode Sound Overhaul
description: A sound replacement pack that gives the game a more Minecraft Story Mode-esque soundscape
body:
**I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE SOUND EFFECTS USED HERE - ALL SOUND EFFECTS OWNED BY EITHER MOJANG OR TELLTALE**

**ALL SOUND EFFECTS RIPPED BY ME DIRECTLY FROM MINECRAFT: STORY MODE (SEASONS 1 & 2)**

This pack replaces some Minecraft sound effects with their Minecraft: Story Mode counterparts. Also features full support for the [Parcool](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool) mod, and minor mod support for some others ([ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound), [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects), etc.)

## PACK FEATURES:
- Enhanced Spider, Iron Golem, Ender Dragon, Stray, Zombie, Bat, Husk, and Creeper sounds! (and many more!)
- EMF support - Some mobs have unique voices!
- Tons of new footstep sounds!
- Fancy placement/breaking sounds for many different blocks!
- Easter Eggs!
- Lots of fireball sounds!
- Actually unique Endermite sounds!
- Mutant Mobs support!
- Quark support!
- Supplementaries & Amendments support!
- Sounds support!
- Create Support!
- Better Combat support!
- Enchancement Support!
- Parcool support! (almost all sounds replaced, plus replaces the energy icons with ones ripped straight from MCSM Season 2!)

If you're looking for an accompanying visual resource pack, check out something like witherstorm0's [Story Mode Style](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-mode-style), and use a good programmer art resource pack like mzov_jen & nostalgic reverie's [PACP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)

Feel free to use in modpacks!!!

## CURRENT ISSUES:
- Some sounds seem to not play in versions past 1.20.1 (Lever)

Logo made with [Ewan Howell's Minecraft Title Generator](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/).
